name: Pragmatism
tagline: Truth is what works. Test ideas by the difference they make.
summary: Pragmatism is the American philosophical answer to abstract metaphysics: judge beliefs by their consequences in lived experience. Ideas are tools, truths are provisional, and inquiry is something you do — not a destination.

quotes.text: We do not learn from experience. We learn from reflecting on experience.
quotes.author: John Dewey

quotes.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.text: A philosophy can usefully be regarded as a tool.
quotes.author: Richard Rorty
